rules: Headings should have tight tracking (tracking-tighter) to feel like old print.
Use italic EB Garamond for captions and diary dates.
First letter of diary entries can be a drop cap (text-5xl font-headings float-left mr-2 mt-1).
NEVER use generic fonts like Inter.
Asymmetric layouts: images and text should sometimes overlap slightly or sit off-center, mimicking the imperfect margins of a manuscript.
Bento/Grid for the 36 Views of Jehol.
Generous padding around text blocks (p-8 to p-12) with subtle borders.

components_and_motion.buttons: bg-[#c53030] text-[#fdf8ef] px-6 py-3 font-headings tracking-widest uppercase text-sm hover:bg-[#9b2c2c] transition-colors

motion.entrance: Fade-in and slight translate-y on scroll (Framer Motion).
motion.hover: Sepia filter removal on image hover, subtle scale up.

interactive: Leaflet Map: Custom tile layer with a sepia filter if possible, custom markers (red cinnabar dots) tracking Napoli->London->Cape->Beijing->Napoli.
Audio Player: Minimalist TTS player for the diary, styled like an ancient wax seal or elegant minimal button.

hero.description: Immersive hero image: an open 18th-century diary on a wooden desk with ancient maps and a compass.
hero.usage: Full-width background or large feature image for the hero section with gradient overlay (bg-black/40).

scene_1_naples.description: 1705 Naples/Rome: Classical 18th-century view of Naples with Mount Vesuvius.

scene_2_journey.description: 1708 Journey: The Donegal ship on the ocean.

scene_3_beijing.description: 1711 Beijing Court: Imperial court of Emperor Kangxi.

scene_6_epilogue.description: Epilogue: Ancient marble tombstone transitioning to Palazzo Corigliano legacy.

stemma_collegio.description: Stemma of the Collegio dei Cinesi

jehol_placeholder.description: Antique 18th-century copperplate engraving of a Chinese landscape (Jehol)

testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build a single-page static site (frontend only) in React + Tailwind (using .js/.jsx, NOT .tsx).

Use standard semantic HTML components or Shadcn UI (lightly customized to remove SaaS feel) if strictly necessary for the image gallery/modal zoom. The design must feel like a scrollytelling manuscript.
Use react-leaflet for the interactive map showing the journey (Napoli -> Londra -> Capo Buona Speranza -> Pechino -> Napoli). Map tiles should ideally be sepia/monochrome if possible.
Implement an audio player (TTS placeholder) for each narrative scene.
Ensure the hero has a cinematic intro (hero immersive).
Create the '36 Views of Jehol' section using a bento grid layout. You can reuse the jehol_placeholder image multiple times to represent the gallery.
Ensure the Epilogue transitions from a lapide (tomb) image to the modern Palazzo Corigliano concept visually or textually.
Inject a light SVG grain or noise overlay fixed on top of the page with pointer-events-none to give an ancient paper texture.
